scripts.dev: npm --workspace packages/shared run build && npm run db:init && concurrently -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm --workspace apps/server run dev:watch" "node scripts/waitForServer.mjs && npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: npm --workspace packages/shared run build && npm --workspace apps/server run build && npm --workspace apps/client run build
scripts.test: npm --workspace packages/shared run test && npm --workspace apps/server run test
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace packages/shared run build && npm --workspace apps/server run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/client run typecheck
